title: Rewind: History and Undo / Redo

chart.options: chart: { height: 380, type: 'bar', animations: { enabled: true }, toolbar: { show: false }, history: { enabled: true, maxDepth: 50, coalesceMs: 250, keyboard: true }, zoom: { enabled: true }, }, colors: ['#7c5cf6'], plotOptions: { bar: { columnWidth: '55%', borderRadius: 4 } }, dataLabels: { enabled: false }, title: { text: 'Undo / redo over data, zoom, and selection', align: 'left' }, xaxis: { categories: ['A', 'B', 'C', 'D', 'E', 'F', 'G'] },
